calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Lanctot for Susan Blomberg (Petitioner).

Mr. Lanctot addressed the issue of "in 1986 dollars" stating that he made the calculations through a website calculator on the Bureau of Labor Statistics (attached as exhibit-D) and then it was computed on a daily basis. Mr. Lanctot also stated that two Nephews and one Niece are to receive gifts, that $100,000.00 goes to Rice University and that the balance of everything else goes to the Trustee of the Trust (Decedent's Spouse). The Court granted the Petition for Instructions (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
